Work SnapshotType: Hourly contractLocation: RemoteCommitment: Flexible scheduleCommission: $60-$200ГўВҖВҰSee this and similar jobs on LinkedIn. data annotation 2026-06-07T04:02:32+00:00 1132962 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-data-annotator-codegeniusrecruit-1132962 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Multi Grade Geographically Position School District No. 27 Full Time, Continuing, multi-grade K-3.<br><br>Effective September 1st, 2026.<br><br>This multi-grade, geographically remote opportunity is an ideal opportunity for the applicant who:<br><br><ul><li>Has an interest in remote teaching</li><li>Has the ability to teach a wide variety of subjects and grade levels in multi-grade settings</li><li>Has the desire to be surrounded by nature</li><li>Has the ability to work well with First Nations communities</li><li>Is comfortable with basic amenities </li><li>Has adequate transportation that would be appropriate for multi-surface highways/roads<br><br></li></ul>This school operates on a 4.5 day per week schedule (extended days) with Friday afternoon off.<br><br><strong>Special Qualifications Required<br><br></strong>To learn more about the area, please visit:<br><br><ul><li>Must be legally eligible to work in Canada (this position is not eligible for an LMIA job sponsored offer)</li><li>Training and experience teaching multigrades at the primary level (including kindergarten)</li><li>Ability to teach a wide-range of learners</li><li>Experience working in geographically remote locations (or relevant life experience living in geographically remote locations)</li><li>Valid BC Teaching Certification with the Teacher Regulation Branch<br><br></li></ul><strong>Salary<br><br></strong>The salary of this assignment is based on our current salary grid and upon verification of your BC TQS as well as verification of years of service from previous employers. The current salary range is $63, 347.00 to $116, 190.00 per annum, paid over 10 months.<br><br>Rural Recruitment and Retention Allowance as well as Rural Travel is paid monthly, during the school year, as part of the provisions in our collective agreement.<br><br><strong>Accommodations<br><br></strong>Subsidized teacherages (mobile homes) are available to the successful candidate and can be furnished, semi-furnished or empty to accommodate your own furniture.<br><br><strong>Information for Applicants<br><br></strong>In School District 27 it is acknowledged that we humbly work, learn, and live on the traditional, ancestral, unceded, and shared lands of the Secwepemc, TsilhqotГўВҖВҷtin, and Dakelh people. This includes the lands of TsqГўВҖВҷescenГҢВ“, StswecemГҢВ“c\XgetГўВҖВҷtem, EskГўВҖВҷetemc, Xatsull, TГўВҖВҷexelc, Tsideldel, TlГўВҖВҷetinqox, YunesitГҢВ“in, TlГўВҖВҷesqox, Xeni GwetГўВҖВҷin, ?Esdilagh and UlkatchotГўВҖВҷen First Nations. We acknowledge that SecwepemctsiГҢВ“n, TsilhqotГўВҖВҷin, and Carrier are the official languages of this land.<br><br>We commit to supporting our new teachers (those with 0-2 years of experience) by facilitating a structured mentorship program. Teachers who desire mentorship but who have more than 2 years experience will qualify for mentorship based on the provisions within our collective agreement.<br><br>We also believe in providing Professional Development beyond the provisions of our collective agreement. The District has engaged in long term contracts with several (up to 6) educational leaders. Teachers can expect to see the educational leaders in our District, up to 2 days prior to a Professional Development Day, offering hands on coaching both in the classroom and in sessions (evening or during the Professional Development Day).<br><br>Our local teachers' union, the Cariboo Chilcotin Teachers' Association, also boasts strong collective agreement language regarding Professional Development as well as financial support for their members to engage in opportunities.<br><br><strong>Relocation allowance may be offered with this position.<br><br></strong><strong>School District No. 27 (Cariboo-Chilcotin) is an equal opportunity employer.</strong> teaching, education, customer support Anahim Lake, 2026-06-07T01:39:52+00:00 1132973 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-multi-grade-geographically-position-school-district-no-27-1132973 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Administrative Support Vish Consulting IT <strong>Job Title: Administrative Support (Data Entry Clerk)<br><br></strong><strong>Location: Westminster CO (Remote Role)<br><br></strong><strong>Contract Role<br><br></strong><strong>Job Overview<br><br></strong>We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Data Entry Clerk to join our team. This role is essential for maintaining accurate and efficient data management within our organization. The ideal candidate will possess strong computer skills, experience with databases and CRM systems, and excellent organizational abilities. This position offers an opportunity to contribute to our digital transformation operations while developing valuable office experience in a professional environment.<br><br><strong>Top Skills<br><br></strong>1-: Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel and Google Workspace (especially Google Sheets).<br><br>2-: Attention to Detail: Ability to spot minor inconsistencies or errors in large volumes of data.<br><br>3-: Experience with Salesforce preferred but not required.<br><br><strong>Duties<br><br></strong><ul><li>Input, update, and maintain data within various databases and CRM systems with high accuracy.</li><li>Perform data entry tasks including order entry, data collection, and transcription.</li><li>Utilize spreadsheets to create pivot tables, organize data, and generate reports as needed.</li><li>Manage filing systems and ensure proper documentation for easy retrieval of information.</li><li>Support administrative functions through typing, organizing files, and maintaining data integrity.</li><li>Conduct basic math calculations to verify data accuracy and process transactions efficiently.</li><li>Collaborate with team members to ensure timely completion of data-related projects and tasks.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>Proven experience in data entry, clerical work, or administrative support preferred.</li><li>Proficiency in Google Workspace or Office Suite, including the use of pivot tables.</li><li>Strong typing skills with high accuracy and attention to detail.</li><li>Familiarity with databases, CRM systems, and order entry processes is highly desirable.</li><li>Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.</li><li>Basic math skills for verifying data accuracy and performing calculations.</li><li>Office experience or administrative background is a plus.</li><li>Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while adhering to deadlines. This position is ideal for candidates who are meticulous, efficient, and eager to support organizational operations through precise data management.</li><li>Ability to effectively work withi
